title: broughtonia pilosa
intro: Broughtonia pilosa, also known as the velvet orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Broughtonia pilosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal medicine to create infusions and salves, although its availability and use are strictly regulated due to its endangered status.
